Product Documentation
& User Guide

A complete walkthrough of NearPop — the hyperlocal discovery platform for deals, rentals, PG stays, and jobs near you.

Platform: Web + PWA URL: nearpop.in Version: 1.0 April 2026
Overview Sign In Onboarding Map & Nearby Browse Profile Settings Feature Summary
00

What is NearPop?

NearPop is a hyperlocal discovery platform that surfaces real-time deals, flat/room rentals, PG & hostel listings, and job opportunities within your immediate geographic vicinity — powered by Live GPS.

🏷️
Deals & Offers
Shop discounts from nearby stores in real time
🏠
Flat / Room
Find rental accommodations near your location
🛏️
PG / Hostel
Affordable paying guest stays nearby
💼
Jobs
Work opportunities within walking distance
📱
PWA Support
Install on any device — no app store needed
01

Sign In

Authentication

Landing Page & Google Sign-In

Visit nearpop.in to reach the login screen. NearPop supports two account types and uses secure Google OAuth for authentication.

  • Select account type: Customer or Merchant
  • Accept NearPop's Terms & Privacy Policy
  • Click "Continue with Google" to authenticate
  • Choose your Google account from the popup
  • No password required — fully Google-secured
Google OAuth

Account Selection

A standard Google account chooser appears. Select your account to complete sign-in instantly — no extra steps, no passwords.

  • Google's secure OAuth 2.0 flow
  • Existing accounts shown for one-tap sign-in
  • Option to use a different account
02

Onboarding

First-time Setup

Pick Your Interest

After signing in, NearPop asks what you're looking for. This personalises which listings appear first on your map — but you can always change it later.

  • Show All — See every nearby listing
  • Deals & Offers — Prioritise discounts
  • Flat / Room — Rental listings first
  • PG / Hostel — Affordable stays
  • Jobs — Work near me
  • Grant GPS permission when prompted
  • Tap "Find Near Me Now!" to proceed
03

Map & Nearby View

Core Feature

Live GPS Map with Listings

The map screen is NearPop's heart. It shows your real-time location and surfaces nearby listings as popup cards. Filter by radius and category to narrow results.

Listing popup with deal details, distance, and action buttons

Clean map view with your location pin and radius filter

  • Red pin = your live GPS location on the map
  • Radius filter: 1 km / 2 km / 5 km / 10 km / 25 km / Anywhere
  • Category tabs: All • Deals • Flats • PG • Jobs
  • Toggle between List and Discover view modes
  • Listing cards show: type, title, price, and distance
  • Tap "View Details →" on a popup for full info
04

Browse / Home Feed

Discovery Feed

Card-Based Listings Feed

The Browse/Home screen (nearpop.in/home) shows all nearby listings as visual cards — sorted by distance and live GPS location.

  • Search bar to filter listings by keyword
  • Category filter pills: All, Deals, Flats, PG, Jobs
  • Each card shows: category badge, distance, title, price, and poster
  • Green cards = Jobs, Yellow/Orange = Deals
  • Tap any card to view full listing details
05

My Profile

User Account

Profile Overview & Stats

The Profile tab shows your account summary, activity stats, and quick actions. Data is cloud-synced automatically.

  • Profile photo and display name from Google
  • Points — Earned by scanning store QR codes
  • Saved — Listings you've hearted/bookmarked
  • Alerts Today — How many popups you received
  • "Scan Store QR for Points" — Loyalty feature
  • Saved Listings section for quick access
  • Cloud Sync indicator (green dot = synced)
06

Notification & Account Settings

Notifications

Notification Controls

Granular control over how many alerts you receive per day and per hour.

  • Pause All Notifications toggle
  • Max per day: 1 / 3 / 5 / 10 / No limit
  • Max per hour: 1 / 2 / 3 / 5 / No limit
Account

Interests & Account Actions

Select which categories trigger notifications and manage your account.

  • My Interests: Deals / Flats / PG / Jobs
  • Sync to Cloud — manual backup trigger
  • Reset Notification History
  • Contact: hello@nearpop.in
  • Install PWA — add to home screen
  • Delete Account (permanent)
  • Sign Out button at the bottom
07
